{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/72289126?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/LilThawg29", "id": 72289126, "login": "LilThawg29", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjcyMjg5MTI2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/LilThawg29", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-49468", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "### Impact

A Host-header parsing flaw in the LiteLLM proxy could, under specific conditions, allow unauthenticated access to protected management routes.

The auth layer derived the effective route from `request.url.path` in `litellm/proxy/auth/auth_utils.py::get_request_route()`, which Starlette reconstructs from the `Host` header. A crafted `Host` could therefore make the auth gate evaluate a different route from the one FastAPI dispatched.

**Most deployments are not affected.** The bypass is blocked by any upstream layer that validates or normalizes `Host`, such as:

- a CDN or WAF, such as Cloudflare
- a reverse proxy with `server_name` allowlists
- a host-based load balancer

**LiteLLM Cloud customers are not affected.**

### Patches

Fixed in **`1.84.0`**. Upgrade to `1.84.0` or later. No configuration change is required.

### Workarounds

If upgrading is not immediately possible, place the proxy behind an upstream component that validates or normalizes the `Host` header before forwarding (a CDN/WAF, a reverse proxy with explicit `server_name` allowlists, or a cloud load balancer with host-based routing rules), or otherwise restrict network access to the proxy listener.

### References

- Patched release: [`v1.84.0`](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.84.0)

**Discovery Credit**: Le The Thang (KCSC) and Kim Ngoc Chung (One Mount Group)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00559, "percentile": 0.42543}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-16T23:38:26Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-49468"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-22T21:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T23:38:26Z", "references": ["https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/security/advisories/GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/releases/tag/v1.84.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-49468", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-49468", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2491520", "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/litellm/PYSEC-2026-388.yaml", "https://pypi.org/project/litellm", "https://security.access.redhat.com/data/csaf/v2/vex/2026/cve-2026-49468.json"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/BerriAI/litellm/security-advisories/GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm", "summary": "LiteLLM: Authentication Bypass via Host Header Injection", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-18T17:26:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4xpc-pv4p-pm3w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.84.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "litellm"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.84.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: LiteLLM: Authentication Bypass via Host Header Injection
